title: ANC - 5.-ANC is ON and User changes its value from Adaptive to Standard or vice versa during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: ANC mode remains active and switchable during a call while Transparency Mode is greyed out with a popup, and settings persist after call ends
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Audio Settings → ANC.
3. Set ANC to ON and select Adaptive mode.
4. Go to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode.
5. Ensure Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected.
6. Initiate or receive a call using the paired Poly Bluetooth device.
7. During the active call, observe the ANC settings in Audio Settings.
8. Attempt to switch between Adaptive and Standard ANC modes during the call.
9. Attempt to access Transparency Mode during the call.
11. After the call ends, observe the ANC settings.
13. Attempt to toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: 1. ANC remains ON during the call. 2. User can switch between Adaptive and Standard ANC modes during the call. 3. Transparency Mode is greyed out/inaccessible during the call. 4. A popup informs the user that Transparency Mode is not available during a call. 5. After the call ends, ANC stays ON with the latest selected value (Adaptive or Standard). 6. After the call ends, Transparency Mode remains OFF with no value selected. 7. After the call ends, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
